title: DCMS prompt payment data - April 2024 to March 2025
body: "This shows the Department for Culture, Media and Sport’s percentage of invoices paid within 5 days and within 30 days of receipt.  The data is released quarterly - for April to June, July to September, October to December, and January to March.  The data published here covers the core department and executive agency only. DCMS sponsored non-departmental public bodies (NDPBs) publish their own data separately. "
